description: Validates that client-side event handler expressions (p-on:*) are type-checked. Catches: (1) wrong p-for variable order causing type mismatches, (2) misuse of $event in arithmetic, (3) unary operators on wrong types.

diagnostics.messageContains: Operator '+' not defined for operand types 'string' and 'int
Operator '+' not defined for operand types 'js.Event' and 'int
Unary operator '!' is not defined for non-boolean type 'int'
